user.title: Set up Fronius System
user.description: Please provide the Fronius host and required customer password. Optionally restrict Modbus Control to this Home Assistant host IP.

legacy_modbus_only_entry_reconfigure.title: Review migrated Fronius configuration
legacy_modbus_only_entry_reconfigure.description: The Fronius entry "{entry_title}" was created with an older version of this integration or is missing the required customer password. It will keep working temporarily, but the configuration model has changed. Open the integration menu and select Reconfigure to review and save the current host and required customer password.

init.title: Set up Fronius System
init.description: Set the Fronius host and required customer password. Optionally restrict auto-enabled Modbus to this Home Assistant host IP.
